name: SC_002_IN_A
scriptCode:
import json
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

# Input data
input_data = input_body

# Parse XML
try:
    root = ET.fromstring(input_data)
    namespaces = {'ns': 'http://schema.infor.com/InforOAGIS/2'}
    
    # Locate errorCount
    error_count_element = root.find('.//ns:ResultsCount/ns:errorCount', namespaces)
    
    # Default value
    custom_file_name = "Rejected"
    
    if error_count_element is not None and error_count_element.text == "0":
        custom_file_name = "Accepted"

except Exception as e:
    custom_file_name = "Rejected"

# Update headers
headers = json.loads(input_header)
headers["custom_fileName"] = custom_file_name
output_header = json.dumps(headers)
output_body = input_body

print(custom_file_name)
